title: Verify --feedback flag injection into build stage
description: Verify that the --feedback flag value ('Use functional style') supplied via @kody --feedback is properly injected into the build stage via {{TASK_CONTEXT}}. The build agent reads {{TASK_CONTEXT}} which the Kody Engine substitutes at runtime; the test checks whether the feedback string is present in the context and used by the build agent to guide implementation style. This is a verification test for the Kody Engine's flag-passing infrastructure, not a code change to the LearnHub application.

existing_patterns.pattern: Uses {{TASK_CONTEXT}} template variable that is substituted by the Kody Engine at runtime with task metadata including flags
taskify stage outputs task.json for the next pipeline stage; classification writes task.json to the task directory
feedback field is stored in run log records; P3T11 tests whether this value flows through to the build stage context
